description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.4.1-jdk8-alpine Docker image and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to disable the daemon. Include a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to a .gradle directory in the project root. Define two stages, build and test. In the build stage add a build job that caches the lab_*/build and .gradle paths with a cache key of $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and a push policy, then runs `gradle --build-cache assemble`. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the same cache, runs `gradle check`, and publishes the lab_*/build/reports directory as an artifact named `${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-TestReports` that expires after two weeks.
